name: Bearings
shortDescription: Industrial bearings for rotating equipment and machinery. We supply ball, roller, and spherical bearings from trusted brands for maintenance and repair operations across Qatar's oil & gas, manufacturing, and infrastructure sectors.
longDescription: Promec Industrial offers a comprehensive range of industrial bearings to keep your machinery running reliably. From ball bearings and roller bearings to spherical and tapered designs, we source from approved manufacturers to meet demanding MRO and project requirements. Our bearings are used in pumps, motors, conveyors, and rotating equipment across oil & gas, petrochemical, power, and water sectors. We provide the right specifications, materials, and sizes to minimize downtime and extend equipment life. Partner with us for bearings that meet international standards and your operational needs.
features: Ball, roller, spherical, and tapered bearing types
Suitable for pumps, motors, conveyors, and rotating equipment
Metric and imperial sizes for MRO and project use
Extended life and reduced downtime for industrial applications

name: Belts
shortDescription: Drive belts and power transmission belts for industrial machinery. V-belts, timing belts, and conveyor belting for maintenance, repair, and operations in Qatar's industrial and manufacturing facilities.
longDescription: Keep your equipment transmitting power efficiently with our range of industrial belts. We supply V-belts, synchronous timing belts, flat belts, and conveyor belting from quality manufacturers for MRO and capital projects. Whether you need replacement belts for pumps, compressors, fans, or conveyor systems, Promec Industrial can provide the correct profile, length, and material. Our belts are specified for oil & gas, manufacturing, and utilities applications, helping you maintain uptime and reduce unplanned stoppages.
features: V-belts, timing belts, and flat belts
Replacement belts for pumps, compressors, and fans
Correct profiles and lengths for OEM compatibility

name: Hand Tools
shortDescription: Professional hand tools for industrial maintenance and repair. Wrenches, screwdrivers, pliers, hammers, and measuring tools from trusted brands for workshops and site operations in Qatar.
longDescription: Equip your teams with reliable hand tools for daily maintenance and repair work. Promec Industrial stocks wrenches, socket sets, screwdrivers, pliers, hammers, chisels, and precision measuring tools from approved brands. Our hand tools meet the demands of mechanical, electrical, and instrumentation trades in oil & gas, construction, and manufacturing. From basic spanners to precision calipers, we help you standardize tooling and improve safety and productivity across your MRO and project activities.
features: Standardization for workshops and site operations
Safety and productivity for MRO teams

name: Motors
shortDescription: Industrial electric motors for pumps, fans, and machinery. AC and DC motors in various frame sizes and power ratings for maintenance, repair, and operations in Qatar's industrial sector.
longDescription: Promec Industrial supplies industrial electric motors for critical MRO and project applications. We offer AC induction motors, high-efficiency motors, and specialty motors in standard frame sizes and power ratings. Our motors are used to drive pumps, fans, compressors, and conveyors in oil & gas, water treatment, and manufacturing. We help you match motor specifications to your equipment, ensure compliance with efficiency standards, and minimize lead times for replacements and upgrades.
features: Standard frame sizes and power ratings
Pump, fan, compressor, and conveyor applications
Compliance with efficiency and safety standards

name: Power Tools
shortDescription: Heavy-duty power tools for industrial maintenance and construction. Drills, grinders, impact wrenches, and cordless kits from trusted brands for workshops and site operations in Qatar.
longDescription: From workshops to site, our power tools deliver the performance your teams need. Promec Industrial offers drills, angle grinders, impact wrenches, cordless kits, and consumables from professional-grade brands. These tools are built for daily use in mechanical, fabrication, and construction environments. We support MRO workshops, EPC contractors, and facility teams with the right power tools and accessories to complete maintenance and repair work safely and on schedule.
features: Suitable for workshops and site operations
Safety and productivity for MRO and construction

name: PPE (Personal Protective Equipment)
shortDescription: Personal protective equipment for industrial and site safety. Helmets, gloves, safety footwear, eye and hearing protection, and workwear for maintenance and operations teams in Qatar.
longDescription: Protect your workforce with quality PPE from Promec Industrial. We supply safety helmets, protective gloves, safety footwear, eye and hearing protection, and high-visibility workwear that meet international standards. Our PPE range supports oil & gas, petrochemical, construction, and general industrial sites, helping you meet safety and compliance requirements. From routine MRO to project mobilizations, we provide the right protection for the job and consistent supply for your team.
features: Consistent supply for site and workshop teams
